# Asian Foods Daily

> Asian Foods Daily is a recipe and food culture website dedicated to authentic Asian cuisine. We publish step-by-step recipes, cooking guides, and culinary stories from across Asia — including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Thai, Vietnamese, Filipino, and Indian food traditions.

## About
Asian Foods Daily helps home cooks prepare authentic Asian dishes with clear, detailed instructions. Our content covers 200+ recipes across 50+ cuisines, from quick 15-minute weeknight meals to traditional recipes worth the extra effort. Every recipe includes cultural context, ingredient guidance, and practical tips.

## Main Sections
- [Recipes](/recipes/): Complete recipe collection with ingredients, step-by-step instructions, and cooking times
- [Blog](/blog/): Food culture articles, cooking techniques, and culinary guides about Asian cuisine
- [Categories](/category/): Organized by cuisine type and dish category

## Popular Recipe Categories
- [Easy Weeknight Dinners](/category/easy-weeknight-dinners/): Quick Asian recipes under 30 minutes
- [Chinese Takeout at Home](/category/chinese-takeout-at-home/): Restaurant-style Chinese dishes made at home
- [Stir-Fry Recipes](/category/stir-fry-recipes/): Classic and modern Asian stir-fry dishes
- [Noodles & Rice Bowls](/category/noodles-and-rice-bowls/): Ramen, pad thai, pho, fried rice and more
- [Asian Soups & Stews](/category/asian-soups-and-stews/): Comforting broths and hearty stews
- [Dim Sum & Dumplings](/category/dim-sum-and-dumplings/): Dumplings, bao, siu mai, and other dim sum
- [Healthy Asian Recipes](/category/healthy-asian-recipes/): Nutritious dishes and light meals

## Cuisines Covered
Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Thai, Vietnamese, Filipino, Indian, Malaysian, Indonesian, Taiwanese, and more

## Content Format
Each recipe includes: prep time, cook time, servings, ingredients list, numbered instructions, nutrition information where available, and tips for success.
